title: U.S. Orders Anthropic to Disable Its Latest AI Model for Foreign Users Over Security Concerns
description: Anthropic has abruptly suspended access to its newly released Claude Fable 5 artificial intelligence model.
content:
Anthropic has abruptly suspended access to its newly released Claude Fable 5 artificial intelligence model after U.S. authorities raised national security concerns just days after its public launch.
